title: cmd/relayfile-cli/main.go
description: Line 1168 uses pre-Go-1.20 seeding pattern. Since project uses Go 1.22 (per CI), use rand.Float64() directly or math/rand/v2.

title: packages/relayfile-sdk/src/client.test.ts
id: packages/relayfile-sdk/src/client.test.ts-Illusory test coverage — SDK tests cannot execute-historian-review, developer-cross-review-medium
description: 974-line test suite imports vitest but vitest is not in devDependencies, no test script exists, CI doesn't run SDK tests. Developer praised these as a strength in phase 1 but they literally cannot run. Combined with CLI's 4 tests, project has effectively zero automated test coverage. CROSS finding from historian, CONFIRMED by developer cross-review.
version "0.0.0" and all SHA256 values are REPLACE_WITH_*_SHA256 strings. No automation updates these from release artifacts. Requires manual replacement which is frequently forgotten.
id: Formula/relayfile.rb-Placeholder SHA256 values with no release automation-historian-review-medium
title: Formula/relayfile.rb

id: packages/relayfile-sdk/package.json-SDK package.json stripped but lockfile contains devDependencies-historian-review-medium
title: packages/relayfile-sdk/package.json
description: package.json has zero dependencies but package-lock.json contains typescript@5.9.3 as devDependency. npm ci would fail or produce inconsistent install. publishConfig provenance was removed and re-added, suggesting churn.
Lines 33-34: Landing page reads CONTENT.md and parses with regex chain. Any formatting change silently breaks the page. Consider proper markdown parser or structured data format.
id: site/src/pages/index.astro-Regex-based markdown parsing for page content-developer-review-medium
